description: App ecosystem landscape — categories, platforms, BYOP share, and recruitment opportunities. Uses app_directory for category/platform enrichment and live generation_event data.

panels.description: Apps listed in APPS.md with a category assigned.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() as apps FROM app_directory WHERE category != ''

panels.title: Directory Apps

panels.description: Distinct users in the selected period whose GitHub ID matches an app_directory entry.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT countDistinct(ge.user_github_id) as users FROM generation_event ge LEFT JOIN app_directory ad ON ge.user_github_id = ad.github_user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time) AND ge.environment = 'production' AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300 AND ge.total_price > 0 AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND ad.category != '' AND ge.user_github_id != '' AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Directory Users

panels.description: Total pollen consumed by users in the app directory.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT sumIf(ge.total_price, ad.category != '') as total FROM generation_event ge LEFT JOIN app_directory ad ON ge.user_github_id = ad.github_user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time) AND ge.environment = 'production' AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300 AND ge.total_price > 0 AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Categorized Pollen

panels.description: Percentage of total platform pollen attributable to directory users.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT if(sum(ge.total_price) > 0, sumIf(ge.total_price, ad.category != '') / sum(ge.total_price), 0) as coverage FROM generation_event ge LEFT JOIN app_directory ad ON ge.user_github_id = ad.github_user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time) AND ge.environment = 'production' AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300 AND ge.total_price > 0 AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Coverage

panels.description: Number of distinct categories in the app directory.

targets.rawSql: SELECT countDistinct(category) as cats FROM app_directory WHERE category != ''

panels.title: Categories

panels.description: Directory users with clean BYOP (redirect-auth) traffic in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT countDistinct(ge.user_github_id) as users FROM generation_event ge LEFT JOIN app_directory ad ON ge.user_github_id = ad.github_user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time) AND ge.environment = 'production' AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300 AND ge.total_price > 0 AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND ad.category != '' AND ge.api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' AND ge.user_github_id != '' AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Users (clean BYOP)

panels.description: Directory users with heuristic BYOP traffic in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT countDistinct(ge.user_github_id) as users FROM generation_event ge LEFT JOIN app_directory ad ON ge.user_github_id = ad.github_user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time) AND ge.environment = 'production' AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300 AND ge.total_price > 0 AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND ad.category != '' AND ge.api_key_created_via != 'redirect-auth' AND ge.api_key_type = 'secret' AND ge.api_key_name LIKE '%.%' AND ge.user_github_id != '' AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Users (heuristic)

panels.description: Per-category economics: tier pollen (subsidy) vs pack pollen (revenue), with subsidy rate and user counts.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT
  ad.category as category,
  cat_counts.apps as apps,
  sumIf(ge.total_price, ge.selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) as tier_pollen,
  sumIf(ge.total_price, ge.selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) as pack_pollen,
  sum(ge.total_price) as total_pollen,
  if(total_pollen > 0, (pack_pollen - tier_pollen) / total_pollen, 0) as profitability,
  count() as requests,
  countDistinct(ge.user_github_id) as unique_users
FROM generation_event ge
LEFT JOIN app_directory ad ON ge.user_github_id = ad.github_user_id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT category, count() as apps FROM app_directory GROUP BY category) cat_counts ON ad.category = cat_counts.category
WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time) AND ge.environment = 'production' AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300 AND ge.total_price > 0 AND ge.user_github_id != '241978997' AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58')) AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
GROUP BY ad.category, cat_counts.apps
HAVING ad.category != ''
ORDER BY total_pollen DESC

panels.title: Category P&L

panels.description: Share of total pollen consumed per category.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT ad.category as category, sum(ge.total_price) as pollen FROM generation_event ge LEFT JOIN app_directory ad ON ge.user_github_id = ad.github_user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time) AND ge.environment = 'production' AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300 AND ge.total_price > 0 AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58')) AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND ad.category != '' GROUP BY ad.category ORDER BY pollen DESC

panels.title: Pollen by Category

panels.description: Tier (free subsidy, orange) vs Pack (paid, green) per category.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT ad.category as category, sumIf(ge.total_price, ge.selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) as tier_pollen, sumIf(ge.total_price, ge.selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) as pack_pollen FROM generation_event ge LEFT JOIN app_directory ad ON ge.user_github_id = ad.github_user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time) AND ge.environment = 'production' AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300 AND ge.total_price > 0 AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58')) AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND ad.category != '' GROUP BY ad.category ORDER BY tier_pollen + pack_pollen DESC

panels.title: Tier vs Pack by Category

panels.description: Daily pollen consumption stacked by category. Shows which categories are growing or declining over time.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT toStartOfInterval(ge.start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) as time, ad.category as category, sum(ge.total_price) as pollen FROM generation_event ge LEFT JOIN app_directory ad ON ge.user_github_id = ad.github_user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time) AND ge.environment = 'production' AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300 AND ge.total_price > 0 AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58')) AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND ad.category != '' GROUP BY time, category ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily Pollen by Category

panels.description: Share of total pollen consumed per platform (web, cli, discord, etc.).

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT ad.platform as platform, sum(ge.total_price) as pollen FROM generation_event ge LEFT JOIN app_directory ad ON ge.user_github_id = ad.github_user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time) AND ge.environment = 'production' AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300 AND ge.total_price > 0 AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58')) AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND ad.platform != '' GROUP BY ad.platform ORDER BY pollen DESC

panels.title: Pollen by Platform

panels.description: Tier (free subsidy, orange) vs Pack (paid, green) per platform.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT ad.platform as platform, sumIf(ge.total_price, ge.selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) as tier_pollen, sumIf(ge.total_price, ge.selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) as pack_pollen FROM generation_event ge LEFT JOIN app_directory ad ON ge.user_github_id = ad.github_user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time) AND ge.environment = 'production' AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300 AND ge.total_price > 0 AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58')) AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND ad.platform != '' GROUP BY ad.platform ORDER BY tier_pollen + pack_pollen DESC

panels.title: Tier vs Pack by Platform

panels.description: Daily pollen consumption stacked by platform. Shows where apps are deployed and how platform distribution changes over time.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT toStartOfInterval(ge.start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) as time, ad.platform as platform, sum(ge.total_price) as pollen FROM generation_event ge LEFT JOIN app_directory ad ON ge.user_github_id = ad.github_user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time) AND ge.environment = 'production' AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300 AND ge.total_price > 0 AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58')) AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND ad.platform != '' GROUP BY time, platform ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily Pollen by Platform

panels.description: Top 50 users by pollen consumption who are NOT in the app directory. Potential recruitment targets — high-usage developers who could register their apps.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT if(ge.user_github_username != '' AND ge.user_github_username != 'undefined', ge.user_github_username, ge.user_github_id) as user, sum(ge.total_price) as total_pollen, sumIf(ge.total_price, ge.selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) as tier_pollen, sumIf(ge.total_price, ge.selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) as pack_pollen, count() as requests, arrayStringConcat(groupUniqArray(ge.api_key_name), ', ') as apps FROM generation_event ge LEFT JOIN app_directory ad ON ge.user_github_id = ad.github_user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time) AND ge.environment = 'production' AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300 AND ge.total_price > 0 AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58')) AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND (ad.category = '' OR ad.category IS NULL) AND ge.user_github_id != '' GROUP BY user ORDER BY total_pollen DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Uncategorized Whales

title: App Ecosystem
